title: Organic NPK Boost 19-19-19
precautions: Apply during morning or evening hours
content: Organic NPK Boost 19-19-19 is a water soluble fertilizer suitable for tomato, chilli, brinjal and cucumber crops. It promotes balanced vegetative growth, improves leaf health and enhances nutrient uptake. Apply 5g per liter as foliar spray during vegetative stage every 10-15 days.

title: SoilGuard Bio Fungicide
content: SoilGuard Bio Fungicide is a biological crop protection product that controls root rot and damping off in paddy, tomato, chilli and vegetables. Apply 2ml per liter as soil drench during transplant stage.

title: GreenPulse Micronutrient Mix
content: GreenPulse Micronutrient Mix corrects zinc deficiency, improves flowering and supports chlorophyll production in cotton, paddy, tomato and chilli crops.

title: DripClean Descaler
content: DripClean Descaler removes scale deposits from drip irrigation systems, prevents clogging and improves water flow. Apply monthly during irrigation maintenance.

title: YieldMax Seaweed Extract
content: YieldMax Seaweed Extract improves flowering, fruit setting and stress tolerance. Recommended during pre-flowering stage every 10 days.

title: NeemRakshak Oil
content: NeemRakshak Oil is an eco-friendly organic insecticide effective against aphids and whiteflies. Apply 5ml per liter during pest infestation.

title: FlowerPlus Amino Booster
content: FlowerPlus Amino Booster reduces flower drop and improves fruit retention during flowering stage.

title: RootPower Humic Granules
content: RootPower Humic Granules improve soil fertility, root development and microbial activity before sowing.

question: Which fertilizer is best for vegetative growth?
answer: Organic NPK Boost 19-19-19 is recommended for balanced vegetative growth.

question: What product helps control root rot?
answer: SoilGuard Bio Fungicide helps control root rot and damping off.

question: How to improve flowering in chilli crop?
answer: YieldMax Seaweed Extract and FlowerPlus Amino Booster improve flowering and fruit setting.

content: Tomato leaf curl causes curling leaves, yellow patches and slow growth. Recommended products include NeemRakshak Oil and GreenPulse Micronutrient Mix.
Chilli flower drop leads to poor fruit set. YieldMax Seaweed Extract and FlowerPlus Amino Booster are recommended.
